# gcore_fastedge_binary (Data Source)

Binaries are WebAssembly executables that are actually executed when app is ran.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "gcore_fastedge_binary" "example" {
  id = 12345
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `api_type` (String) Wasm API type
- `checksum` (String) MD5 hash of the binary
- `id` (Number) The ID of this resource.
- `source` (Number) Source language:  
0 - unknown  
1 - Rust  
2 - JavaScript
- `status` (Number) Status code:  
0 - pending  
1 - compiled  
2 - compilation failed (errors available)  
3 - compilation failed (errors not available)  
4 - resulting binary exceeded the limit  
5 - unsupported source language
- `unref_since` (String) Not used since (UTC)
||||||| parent of 67100eac (fix: compilation of Go SDK call with binary file upload)

# gcore_fastedge_binary (Data Source)

FastEdge binaries are immutable WebAssembly modules that implement edge application logic.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "gcore_fastedge_binary" "example_fastedge_binary" {
  id = 0
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `api_type` (String) Wasm API type
- `checksum` (String) MD5 hash of the binary
- `id` (Number) The ID of this resource.
- `source` (Number) Source language:  
0 - unknown  
1 - Rust  
2 - JavaScript
- `status` (Number) Status code:  
0 - pending  
1 - compiled  
2 - compilation failed (errors available)  
3 - compilation failed (errors not available)  
4 - resulting binary exceeded the limit  
5 - unsupported source language
- `unref_since` (String) Not used since (UTC)
